title: LABO AI : Visual AI lab for designing neural networks | Product Hunt
excerpt: LABO AI is a visual AI workspace for designing, exploring, and executing neural network architectures directly in the browser. Build models by connecting typed blocks, inspect synchronized PyTorch code in real time, execute and compare architectures, and collaborate with AI agents that help design and refine models. Built for researchers, engineers, educators, and anyone exploring modern AI.
content_html: LABO AI is a visual AI workspace for designing, exploring, and executing neural network architectures directly in the browser. Build models by connecting typed blocks, inspect synchronized PyTorch code in real time, execute and compare architectures, and collaborate with AI agents that help design and refine models. Built for researchers, engineers, educators, and anyone exploring modern AI.
content_text: LABO AI is a visual AI workspace for designing, exploring, and executing neural network architectures directly in the browser. Build models by connecting typed blocks, inspect synchronized PyTorch code in real time, execute and compare architectures, and collaborate with AI agents that help design and refine models. Built for researchers, engineers, educators, and anyone exploring modern AI.

blocks.html_en: LABO AI is a visual AI workspace for designing, exploring, and executing neural network architectures directly in the browser. Build models by connecting typed blocks, inspect synchronized PyTorch code in real time, execute and compare architectures, and collaborate with AI agents that help design and refine models. Built for researchers, engineers, educators, and anyone exploring modern AI.

sentences.en: LABO AI is a visual AI workspace for designing, exploring, and executing neural network architectures directly in the browser.
sentences.zh: LABO AI 是一个视觉 AI 工作区，用于直接在浏览器中设计、探索和执行神经网络架构。

sentences.en: Build models by connecting typed blocks, inspect synchronized PyTorch code in real time, execute and compare architectures, and collaborate with AI agents that help design and refine models.
sentences.zh: 通过连接类型块来构建模型，实时检查同步的 PyTorch 代码，执行和比较架构，并与帮助设计和完善模型的 AI 代理协作。

sentences.en: Built for researchers, engineers, educators, and anyone exploring modern AI.
sentences.zh: 专为研究人员、工程师、教育工作者和任何探索现代人工智能的人而打造。

content_html_zh: LABO AI 是一个视觉 AI 工作区，用于直接在浏览器中设计、探索和执行神经网络架构。 通过连接类型块来构建模型，实时检查同步的 PyTorch 代码，执行和比较架构，并与帮助设计和完善模型的 AI 代理协作。 专为研究人员、工程师、教育工作者和任何探索现代人工智能的人而打造。
